## Critical Issues (❌ BLOCKERS)

### Program Identity
- **Issue**: V2MOM field contains placeholder "[TBD — link V2MOM]"
- **Current State**: Template placeholder still present
- **Required Action**: Link to actual FY27 V2MOM document

### Program Team
- **Issue**: ALL 7 team members have placeholder names
- **Current State**: [PM Name], [SWE Name], [UX Name], [TPM Name], [Tech Writer Name], [PMM Name], [Architect Name]
- **Required Action**: Replace ALL placeholders with actual names before Phase 1 inspection

### Document Status
- **Issue**: Start Target Release shows "TBD — Private Beta" and Inspection Date is "[TBD]"
- **Current State**: Critical dates missing
- **Required Action**: Set actual target release month and inspection date

### Success Metrics
- **Issue**: All 6 metrics have incomplete targets - many show "TBD", "↓ vs. baseline", or vague targets
- **Current State**: M1/M2 use relative targets; M6 is completely TBD
- **Required Action**: Provide specific numerical targets for 30-day and 90-day milestones

### Team Allocation
- **Issue**: All pod allocation percentages show "TBD%"
- **Current State**: 6 pods listed but no actual allocation numbers
- **Required Action**: Assign real allocation percentages for each pod/team

### Prioritized Feature List
- **Issue**: All GUS Project IDs show "[GUS TBD]", all TDs show "TBD"
- **Current State**: 10 features listed but no GUS tracking
- **Required Action**: Create GUS projects and link Technical Design docs

### Release Timeline
- **Issue**: ALL milestone dates show "[TBD]"
- **Current State**: 6 milestones with no actual dates
- **Required Action**: Set real target dates for Phase 1 Complete through GA

### Pre-Read Requirement
- **Issue**: No demo delivery confirmation - name, timestamp, and links all "[TBD]"
- **Current State**: Pre-read section empty
- **Required Action**: Confirm demo delivery with actual name, timestamp, and links

### Launch Readiness Checklist
- **Issue**: No checklist items marked complete
- **Current State**: 10 items listed, none checked
- **Required Action**: Complete at least 50% of checklist items before Phase 1 inspection

### Go-To-Market
- **Issue**: Positioning statement present but checklist shows zero progress
- **Current State**: Comprehensive checklist but no completion tracking
- **Required Action**: Mark completed items and provide timeline for remaining

### Program Artifacts
- **Issue**: All artifacts show "TBD" except PRD which has a link
- **Current State**: HLD, HLTD, HLPD, Figmas all missing
- **Required Action**: While optional for Phase 1, at least HLD should be started
